problems.diagnostic: Target (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port types directly; port names must be used as expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Target with Target - Actual in the expression for e

problems.diagnostic: Actual (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port types directly; port names must be used as expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Actual with Target - Actual in the expression for e

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex, replace the expression 'variable e = Target - Actual;' with 'variable e = Target - Actual;'
Ensure that all references to Target and Actual in the AGREE annex use only the port names as provided in the component type
